revision.comment: Bot: Creating normal ill redirect for [[Category:Lua-based templates]].
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Country data Straits Settlements]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:qq]]

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Country data Straits Settlements]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki> [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:qq]]

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Straits Settlements | flag alias = Flag of the British Straits Settlements (1925–1946).svg | flag alias-1868 = Flag of the British Straits Settlements (1868–1877).svg | flag alias-1874 = Flag of the British Straits Settlements (1874–1904).svg | flag alias-1904 = Flag of the British Straits Settlements (1904–1925).svg | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of the British Straits Settlements (1904–1946).svg | flag alias-civil-1874 = Civil Ensign of the British Straits Settlements (1874–1904).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1868 | var2 = 1874 | var3 = 1904 | var4 = civil | var5 = civil-1874 | related1 = British Singapore | related2 = Colony of Singapore | related3 = Crown Colony of Penang | related4 = Crown Colony of Malacca </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Straits_Settlements here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Straits_Settlements for full history.
